---
pagetitle: "Book a Call — chen.ist"
title-block-style: none
description: "Schedule a free consultation with chen.ist. 30 minutes, no pitch, just an honest look at what you need."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .quarto-title-block, #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
        #quarto-content > * { margin-top: 0 !important; padding-top: 0 !important; }
        main.content { padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
        footer { margin-top: 0 !important; }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero" style="padding: 10rem 0 4rem;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 700px;">
    <h1>Book a <span class="gr">Call</span></h1>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at what you need and how we can help.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding: 2rem 0 6rem;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 800px;">
    <div id="cal-embed" style="min-height: 600px;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  if (typeof Cal !== 'undefined') {
    Cal("inline", {elementOrSelector: "#cal-embed", calLink: "chenist", layout: "month_view"});
  }
});
</script>
```
